steps.t: Yonderboars and fallen apples can be found below the apple trees about the northern farm in Tighfield. Rosalinda North-took has asked you to collect Y…
Finola is in Nobottle. You should bring the Yonderboar meat and apples to Finola Whortleberry.
Finola and her oven are located in Nobottle. Finola has asked you to use her oven to bake an apple and Yonderboar pie.
Diamond North-took can be found in Nobottle. Bring the pie to Diamond.
